title: Hoofdstuk 13 - Intro tot CSS Grid Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Eenvoudige grids maken voor moderne layouts.

questions.prompt: Which declaration enables CSS Grid on a container?

explanations.overview: display: grid makes the container use Grid layout.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. display: grid makes the container use Grid layout.
byOptionId.b: Correct. display: grid makes the container use Grid layout.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. display: grid makes the container use Grid layout.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. display: grid makes the container use Grid layout.

explanations.overview: 1fr is one fraction of available space in the grid container.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. 1fr is one fraction of available space in the grid container.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. 1fr is one fraction of available space in the grid container.
byOptionId.c: Correct. 1fr is one fraction of available space in the grid container.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. 1fr is one fraction of available space in the grid container.
